scientific_integrity.detail: No fabricated statistics, p-values, or citations were produced across all evaluated outputs; all claims trace to input data or documented tool behavior.

practice_boundaries.detail: All outputs remained within biostatistics and data visualization scope; no unsupported clinical or diagnostic recommendations were made.

methodological_ground.detail: No methodological fallacies detected; outputs apply standard approaches appropriate to biostatistics and data visualization tasks.

code_usability.detail: Script compiles cleanly; column name validation documented in Error Handling. No regex validation logic found in script — documentation fix not yet applied to code.

functional_suitability.note: Insufficient significant genes warning in Error Handling; column name validation documented; parameter override documentation in Response Template.

reliability.note: Fallback template present; insufficient genes warning closes silent behavior gap; column name validation documented.

performance_context.note: SKILL.md is 155 lines — well-sized; no references/ folder; algorithm section adds value.

agent_usability.note: Audit-Ready Commands section with data-driven test command; parameter overrides mandatory in Assumptions; column name validation documented.

human_usability.note: Description is discoverable; 'force-directed repulsion' may be too technical for some users.

security.note: Column name validation documented in Error Handling; local file I/O; no credentials. Script-level regex enforcement not confirmed.

maintainability.note: Clean script separation; requirements.txt present; no references/ folder.

agent_specific.note: Insufficient genes warning closes silent behavior gap; column name validation improves security; parameter override documentation improves traceability.

key_strengths: Insufficient significant genes warning documented in Error Handling — closes the primary v1 silent behavior gap
Column name validation documented in Error Handling — closes the v2 injection risk gap
Parameter override documentation mandatory in Assumptions — improves output traceability
Audit-Ready Commands section with data-driven test command enables faster functional verification
Tight scope definition (labeling only, not DEG analysis) enables clean composition with upstream tools

recommendations.title: Column name validation documented but not implemented in script
recommendations.problem: Error Handling documents that column name parameters must be validated for alphanumeric/underscore/hyphen characters, but no regex validation logic was found in scripts/main.py.
recommendations.root_cause: Documentation fix applied to SKILL.md but script-level validation was not implemented.
recommendations.fix: Add regex validation in main.py before using column name parameters: import re; if not re.match(r'^[a-zA-Z0-9_-]+$', col_name): sys.exit(f'Invalid column name: {col_name}'). Apply to --log2fc-col, --pvalue-col, and --gene-col.

recommendations.title: No custom gene list labeling documented
recommendations.problem: The skill does not document a way to label a specific user-provided gene list in addition to or instead of top-N by significance score.
recommendations.root_cause: Parameters table does not include a --gene-list or equivalent option.
recommendations.fix: Consider adding a --gene-list parameter accepting a file of gene names to label, and document it in the Parameters table alongside --top-n.
